intro.title: The shadcn/ui registry for <1>B2B SaaS products</1>.
intro.subtitle: 10 essential components — pricing, trial, usage, onboarding, billing — ready to use, installable in one command.

pricingTable.description: Complete pricing table with monthly/annual toggle, highlighted recommended plan, and feature comparison table. Designed to maximize conversions.

props.features: List of features to compare in the table.
props.onSelectPlan: Callback triggered when a plan is clicked.

notes: The Pro plan is automatically highlighted with a 'Recommended' badge and emerald border.
The monthly/annual toggle applies a 20% discount on annual prices.
Boolean values in features display a ✓ (true) or — (false) icon.

trialBanner.description: Alert banner displayed at the top of the application indicating the number of days remaining in the trial period. Adapts its color based on urgency (normal / warn / danger).

props.daysRemaining: Number of days remaining in the trial period.
props.planName: Name of the plan to upgrade to.
props.onUpgrade: Callback triggered when the CTA is clicked.
props.onDismiss: Callback triggered when the banner is closed.

notes: Normal (> 7 days): discrete emerald banner.
Warn (≤ 7 days): yellow warning banner.
Danger (≤ 3 days): urgent red banner.
The banner can be closed by the user (local state).

usageMeter.description: Visual progress bar to track resource consumption (API calls, storage, credits). Automatically handles threshold alerts.
notes: The bar automatically changes color based on thresholds (emerald -> yellow -> red).
Alert subtext only shows when a threshold is exceeded.
Uses formatNumber to display k/M beyond 1000/1M.

onboardingSteps.description: Interactive checklist to guide new users through account configuration. Includes a global progress bar.

props.steps: List of steps with title, description, and action.
props.onStepComplete: Callback when a step is validated.
props.onStepSkip: Callback when a step is skipped.
props.onAllComplete: Callback when all steps are completed.

notes: The next incomplete step is automatically expanded when a step is finished.
Displays a congratulations state once everything is completed.
Supports skipping steps (skippable) with a different visual style.

upgradeModal.description: Persuasive modal window to encourage users to upgrade to a higher plan when they encounter a limit or a locked feature.

props.featureName: Name of the feature that triggered the modal.
props.targetPlan: The plan the user needs to upgrade to.

notes: Adapts dynamically if triggered by a specific feature (feature gating).
Design focused on clarity of benefits and simplicity of action.
Integrates the 20% annual discount logic.

teamInvite.description: Complete team management interface: email invitation with role selection, active member list, pending invitations, and revocation.

props.maxMembers: Member limit (displays a message if reached).

notes: Three available roles: Admin (full access), Member (create/edit), Viewer (read-only).
Email validation is integrated with error messages.
When maxMembers is reached, the invitation form is replaced by an upgrade CTA.

invoiceRow.description: Invoice list component with color-coded statuses (paid, pending, failed, refunded), formatted amounts, and download/view actions.
notes: Amounts are formatted using Intl.NumberFormat based on the currency.
Actions (download, view) appear on row hover.
InvoiceList displays an empty state if the list is empty.

planBadge.description: Compact badge displaying the user's current plan (Free, Trial, Pro, Enterprise). Available in three sizes and with a CTA variant to encourage upgrading.
notes: PlanBadgeWithCTA displays an 'Upgrade to Pro' link for free and trial plans.
The badge uses the plan-badge-* CSS classes defined in index.css.

apiKeyCard.description: API key display card with default masking, on-demand reveal, one-click copy, and secure rotation with confirmation.
notes: Rotation requires double confirmation to avoid errors.
The key is masked by default, only the prefix and last 4 characters are visible.
The Copy button provides visual feedback for 2 seconds.

featureGate.description: Declarative wrapper that controls access to a feature based on the user's plan. Supports multiple blocking modes: overlay, blur, replace, or hide.

props.children: Content to display if access is allowed.

notes: Overlay mode: content is visible but covered by a blocking panel.
Blur mode: content is blurred and semi-transparent.
Replace mode: content is replaced by an upgrade message.
Hide mode: content is simply hidden (null).
The useFeatureAccess and usePlanAccess hooks are available for conditional logic.

dx.title: Developer Experience
dx.description: Unitary installation via shadcn CLI. Zero extra npm dependencies. 100% modifiable source code in your project.

saas.title: SaaS B2B Patterns
saas.description: Components designed specifically for SaaS challenges: maximizing conversion, managing usage, and securing access.

brutalism.description: A bold aesthetic that combines the robustness of brutalism with the finesse of a modern, readable product interface.
